title: Tender Middle-Eastern Italian Fennel Sausages Shawarma Style Wrap
description: A fusion of Italian and Middle-Eastern flavors, these shawarma-style fennel sausages are served in a crispy pita bread with crunchy vegetables.

ingredients.name: Italian Fennel Sausages
ingredients.notes: Choose a high-quality, all-natural sausage with fennel seeds

ingredients.name: Pita Bread
ingredients.notes: Look for whole wheat or whole grain options for added nutrition

ingredients.name: Fresh Parsley
ingredients.notes: Choose fresh parsley for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Fresh Cucumber
ingredients.notes: Use a thin-skinned cucumber for the best texture

ingredients.name: Tomato
ingredients.notes: Choose a vine-ripened tomato for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Red Onion
ingredients.notes: Use a sweet onion for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Tahini Sauce
ingredients.notes: Choose a high-quality tahini sauce with no added sugars

ingredients.name: Lemon Juice
ingredients.notes: Use freshly squeezed lemon juice for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Garlic Powder
ingredients.notes: Choose a high-quality garlic powder for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality, unrefined salt for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Black Pepper
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality, freshly ground black pepper for the best flavor

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Slice the Italian Fennel Sausages into 1-inch rounds and season with garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Grill the sausage rounds for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Warm the pita bread by wrapping it in foil and heating it in the oven for 5 minutes.
Assemble the shawarma by placing a few slices of sausage on each pita round, followed by a slice of tomato, a few slices of cucumber, and a sprinkle of parsley.
Drizzle the tahini sauce over the top of each shawarma and serve immediately.
Serve with a side of mixed greens or a simple salad for added nutrition.
Consider adding other toppings such as pickled turnips, sumac, or chopped walnuts for added flavor and texture.
